name: Howelsen Hill Tennis Courts
description: Howelsen Hill Tennis Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Steamboat Springs, CO. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Steamboat Tennis and Pickleball Complex
description: Steamboat Tennis and Pickleball Complex is a place to play pickleball in Steamboat Springs, CO. There are 20 asphalt courts. 8 are outdoors and 12 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, food, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
